title: Shooting Stars
body: # About: **Shooting Stars** is a Minecraft mod with the sole purpose of adding extra fun items to the game. Developed to submit to [Hackclub's Hackcraft YSWS](https://hackcraft.hackclub.com/), it adds a custom weapon **Celebration** inspired by Terraria's Celebration Mk2. In addition, it adds custom items and crafting recipes to obtain the **Star**, then **Star Shards**, and finally the **Celebration!** # Features: - New Weapon (**Celebration**) - Homing Randomly Generated Fireworks - New Item (**Star** & **Star Shard**) - Crafting Recipe for **Star** - Anvil crushing recipe for **Star Shard** - Custom textures <3 # Screenshots: # Additional Information: Github Repository: https://github.com/DDbrother9999/shootingstars License: MIT made with love <3 DDbrother
